narrative:
Cols 87-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 770 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
